---
title: "My Storyboard at IAS - tabs"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard) # always
```

<!-- links -->
```{r}
map1link= "https://github.com/CIENCIA-DE-DATOS-ESPACIALES-1IAS21-05A1/EVALUACION-1/raw/main/map1.rds"
viz1=url(map1link)

map2link= "https://github.com/CIENCIA-DE-DATOS-ESPACIALES-1IAS21-05A1/EVALUACION-1/raw/main/map2.rds"
viz2=url(map2link)

map3link= "https://github.com/CIENCIA-DE-DATOS-ESPACIALES-1IAS21-05A1/EVALUACION-1/raw/main/map3.rds"
viz3=url(map3link)
```

## Sidebar {.sidebar}


Los mapas representa la población de China

## Column {.tabset .tabset-fade}


### Dot Density Map (DDM)

```{r fig.width=12, fig.height=9}
readRDS(viz1)
```


### Proportional Symbol Map (PSM)

```{r fig.width=12, fig.height=9}
readRDS(viz2)
```

### Coropleto

```{r fig.width=12, fig.height=9}
readRDS(viz3)
```
